highlights.title: Portable Semantic Backend Roadmap Correction
highlights.description: v0.1.15 established semantic retrieval as a product capability. The corrected roadmap keeps that capability but moves away from requiring runtime SQLite extension loading; sqlite-vec is treated as an optional accelerator direction, not a required foundation.

highlights.title: EmbeddingService
highlights.description: Provider-agnostic embedding abstraction remains the foundation for semantic indexing across both legacy and future portable semantic backends.

highlights.title: Hybrid FTS5 + Semantic Retrieval
highlights.description: Keyword (FTS5) and semantic results remain part of the public search contract while the retrieval backend is being generalized away from a sqlite-vec-specific KNN path.

highlights.title: semantic_search MCP Tool
highlights.description: Meaning-based agent queries are tied to semantic backend capability, not to a specific SQLite extension loading mechanism.
